beIN SPORTS 1.title: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against in the Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League, winning 4-0 at the Emirates and drawing 1-1 at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium this season. Only two other managers have gone unbeaten in their first three games against Atlético boss Diego Simeone in the competition: Carlo Ancelotti and Maurizio Sarri. Winless in their two games against Arsenal this season, Atlético Madrid last faced an opponent 3+ times in a single campaign without managing a victory in 2022-23, versus Real Madrid.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Liverpool vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Liverpool vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20. They last lost three in a row against the Blues between December 2013 and November 2014. Following their 2-1 win at Stamford Bridge in October, Chelsea are looking to complete the league double over Liverpool for the first time since 2013-14.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20. They last lost three in a row against the Blues between December 2013 and November 2014. Following their 2-1 win at Stamford Bridge in October, Chelsea are looking to complete the league double over Liverpool for the first time since 2013-14.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Sunderland vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Sunderland vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United, with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition. Manchester United have lost just one of their 15 visits to the Stadium of Light to face Sunderland in the Premier League, going down 2-1 in February 2016.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Paris SG have scored 13 goals without conceding a single one in their last three matches against Brest in all competitions. Paris SG are on a 33-match unbeaten run against Brest in all competitions, the joint-longest unbeaten streak in their history against a single opponent.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Burnley vs Aston Villa - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Burnley vs Aston Villa - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Burnley have won just two of their 13 Premier League games against Aston Villa, and are winless in five since a 3-2 home win in January 2021. Aston Villa have won their last three Premier League games against Burnley, as many as they had in their first 10 against them.

Mallorca have lost their last two home LaLiga games against Villarreal, having gone unbeaten in their previous six ; they could lose three consecutive home matches against them in the competition for only the second time in their history, after a three-game losing streak between 2006 and 2009.
